text: Implement a dynamic importance scoring system that updates based on the most recent and critical program artifacts. This will ensure the agent focuses on the most relevant and impactful tasks, avoiding the pitfalls of 'recent noise' and improving the efficiency of memory consolidation.
reason: This addresses the recent 'Importance scoring per memory' issue by creating a more adaptive and context-aware scoring mechanism, ensuring the agent's learning remains aligned with current priorities and reduces the overhead of constantly re-evaluating importance scores.
